Peterson, III, Esq. of Law Offices of Peterson & Peterson 586-7460 for deft & moving party; Scott Okamoto, Esq. of Sedgwick, Detert, Moran & Arnold LLP 781-7900 for deft/x-complainant Alison Tam.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. The arbitration clause is broad and embraces each of plaintiffs' causes of action for all are premised on a failure to deliver the property as required by the escrow agreement. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
